name: Binary Two-Stage Retrieval
description: Two-stage retrieval: Stage 1 = binary 64-dim HNSW (4GB index for 500M records), Stage 2 = FP32 768-dim re-rank of top-100 candidates. Uses fine-tuned nomic-embed-v1.5 (pipe format) from experiment 003. Tests hypothesis H2: binary ANN + re-rank achieves 95%+ of full-precision recall.
notes: The production architecture experiment. Compare to exp 003 (full precision single-stage) to measure the quality cost of binary Stage 1 + re-rank. Target: < 5pp quality loss, >30x memory savings.
